name: @tank/security-review
description: Security best practices for web apps. Covers OWASP Top 10, input validation, authentication, authorization, XSS/CSRF prevention, SQL injection, secrets, and secure headers. Framework-specific guidance for JS/TS, Python, Node.js. Triggers: security, vulnerability, XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, authentication, authorization, OWASP, input validation, sanitization, encryption, secrets, JWT, session, CORS, CSP, security headers, dependency audit, security review, penetration testing.
